on_write: let payload_str = payload; let doc = json(payload_str); if doc.type == "" { return #{"action": "Abort", "error": "Missing doc type"}; } return #{"action": "Allow"};
on_index: let vec = vector_data; let query = query_vector; if query.len() == 0 { return #{"score": 0.0}; } let d = cosine_similarity(vec, query); return #{"score": d};
on_lifecycle: let age_ns = neuron.age_ns; if age_ns > (config.ttl * 1000000000) { return #{"delete_neuron": true}; } return #{};
